query_normalized: from chatbot to digital colleague: the paradigm shift toward persistent autonomous ai computer science
rationale: This paper is the foundational reference defining the specific "Chatbot to Digital Colleague" framework and paradigm shift the user is investigating, satisfying criterion (d) as a canonical reference for the technique or conceptual framework being applied. It establishes the essential terminology and conceptual dimensions (cognitive core, tool-augmented execution) required for any literature review on this topic.
